tools_grid.page_desc: {n} AI tools ready to use. Pick one, upload a photo when needed, and hit Generate.
tools_grid.pinned_empty: You haven't pinned any tools yet. Tap the pin icon on a card.
tools_grid.tool_studio_desc: Text, photo + prompt, or ready-made styles.
tools_grid.tool_clothes_desc: Change anyone's outfit. Upload clothing or describe it in text.
tools_grid.tool_art_desc: 33 styles: anime, oil, watercolor, comic, fantasy, cyberpunk, and more.
tools_grid.tool_pro_desc: 20 presets: cinematic realism, editorial mood, enhancements.
tools_grid.tool_bg_remove_desc: Clean cutout with transparency. Works on logos and faces.
tools_grid.tool_upscale_desc: 2× or 4× upscale. Recover soft or blurry photos.
tools_grid.tool_restore_desc: Old photos → sharp. Reduces noise, improves faces.
tools_grid.tool_inpaint_desc: Paint a region, describe what to add. Remove people, text, objects.
tools_grid.tool_posters_desc: 20 templates: flyers, editorial, epic, sci-fi, hero, music phone. Photo optional.
tools_grid.tool_manga_studio_desc: Manga/comic studio: characters, poses, scenes, and panels.
tools_grid.tool_wizard_desc: Not sure what to ask? Five questions and your prompt is ready.
tools_grid.tool_result_empty: Your result appears here after you generate.
tools_grid.tool_prompt_ph: Describe what you want to create…
tools_grid.tool_accept_formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP or HEIC up to 10 MB
tools_grid.cat_generation_desc: Create images from text or transform your photos.
tools_grid.cat_utility_desc: Quick fixes and clean-ups for any image.
tools_grid.cat_video_desc: Animate stills or generate short clips.

clothes_changer.garment_helper: Photo of the garment to wear
clothes_changer.change_color_hint: Keeps outfit, changes only color or pattern
clothes_changer.prompt_ph: e.g. "elegant red silk dress with thin straps, evening event style"
clothes_changer.err_person: Upload a photo of the person.
clothes_changer.err_garment: Upload a garment photo OR describe the new outfit in text.
clothes_changer.description: Swap anyone's outfit. Upload a person photo and garment reference or describe the look in text.

studio.art_empty: Pick a style (tap a cover) or write 3+ words in the prompt.
studio.studio_desc: Optional photo, free-form prompt, and ready-made styles — combine them any way you like. The steps below guide your flow without limiting creativity.
studio.studio_acc_prompt: 2. WHAT DO YOU WANT TO CREATE?
studio.studio_placeholder_photo: e.g. sunset beach background, dark elegant suit, softer light…
studio.studio_placeholder_text: e.g. futuristic city at sunset, blue and pink neon, cinematic atmosphere…
studio.studio_plus_locked_toast: Studio Plus — 30 days with the Creator pack (€12): 1080p/720p video, 8–10s clips, prompt enhance & HD images.
studio.studio_plus_video_banner: 1080p, 720p, 8–10s and AI prompt enhance unlock with Studio Plus (Creator €12 / month).
studio.studio_cta_blocked: Upload a photo to use this style
studio.studio_err_blocked: Upload a photo to apply a style, or remove the style.
studio.studio_err_text: Describe what you want to create (at least 3 characters).
studio.studio_err_edit: Describe the edit you want on your photo.
studio.studio_gen_hint_photo: Upload the required photo to continue
studio.studio_gen_hint_video: Upload your video and describe the edit to continue
studio.studio_gen_hint_prompt: Describe what you want (at least 3 characters)
studio.studio_gen_hint_fields: Fill in the required fields to continue
studio.studio_gen_hint_blocked: Add a photo or remove the style to generate from text only
studio.studio_gen_hint_brief: Complete the campaign brief and all slides to continue
studio.studio_gen_hint_garment: Add a garment photo or describe the outfit to continue
studio.studio_gen_hint_person: Upload the person photo to continue
studio.art_subtitle: Pick an art style, combine lighting, lens and mood — generate from text or edit a photo.
studio.art_err_image_mode: Upload a photo in Image mode.
studio.art_refine_unavailable: Refine unavailable — using your original prompt.
studio.art_prompt_ph_image: What you want to change in the photo...
studio.art_result_empty: The result appears here after generating
studio.art_hero_subtitle: Create cinematic, anime, realistic or conceptual images with professional control.
studio.art_result_empty_hint: Choose a style, tune effects and hit generate.
studio.art_quick_1: Cinematic portrait, soft rim light, shallow depth of field
studio.art_quick_2: Anime character, vibrant colors, clean line art, studio background
studio.art_quick_3: Epic fantasy landscape, golden hour, volumetric fog
studio.art_quick_4: Editorial fashion photo, dramatic shadows, glossy skin
studio.art_quick_5: Cyberpunk city street, neon rain, moody atmosphere
studio.art_quick_6: Watercolor illustration, dreamy pastel palette, paper texture
studio.art_module_style_hint: 110+ styles · identity lock on every photo edit (May 2026)
studio.art_module_prompt_hint: Describe your vision or edit a photo
studio.art_lab_image_hint: AI Lab requires Image mode with a photo.
studio.art_lab_need_photo: Upload a photo for AI Lab styles.
studio.art_photo_engine_note: Premium photoreal · identity locked · professional previews
studio.art_photo_desc: Upload your photo and pick a photographic look — face, age and body stay unchanged.
studio.art_photo_identity_badge: Identity lock · face · age · body · pose
studio.art_photo_image_hint: Photography styles require Image mode with your photo.
studio.art_photo_need_photo: Upload a photo for photoreal styles.
studio.art_refine_unchanged: Prompt unchanged — try adding more detail.
studio.art_flow_step_generate_hint: Describe your idea or upload a photo to edit
studio.art_flow_step_style_hint: Pick a look from the gallery to steer the result
studio.art_flow_step_effects_hint: Lighting, lens and mood — extra control only if you need it
studio.art_pick_style_hint: Write your prompt first, then pick a style in step 2 if you want.

wizard.wiz_q_subject: What's the subject? (a person, a place, an object…)
wizard.wiz_q_mood: What's the mood? (cinematic, dreamy, intense, playful…)
wizard.wiz_q_style: Any visual style preference? (photo, watercolor, anime, oil paint…)
wizard.wiz_q_light: Lighting? (golden hour, dramatic backlight, studio, candlelit…)
wizard.wiz_q_extras: Anything else? (composition, framing, props, color palette…)
wizard.wiz_modal_apply_hint: Edit if you like, then apply to the prompt field — your selected style and effects stay in place.
wizard.wiz_desc: Not sure how to describe your idea? In 5 steps I'll guide you to a pro prompt ready to generate.
wizard.wiz_q4_ph: e.g. "Woman in her 30s with short hair on a Lisbon rooftop at sunset, warm golden light"
wizard.wiz_q5_ph: Type "no" to skip, or describe who/what is the reference
wizard.wiz_q5_hint: e.g. "Ana's face from iPhone photos", "an Eames chair", or leave blank.

posters.editor_error_desc: Something went wrong loading the editor. Go back and try again, or refresh the page.
posters.grid_desc: {n} real templates from the original bot — music, food, fitness, motivational and flyers. Apply your photo and generate in high resolution with the engine you choose.
posters.fill_hint: Fill in the fields and tap Generate.
posters.template_ready: Ready-to-use template — attach a reference photo (optional), pick the AI model, set mood and palette. The prompt is tuned for the best result.
posters.visual_hint: By default the poster keeps the template colors and mood. Use “Template default” for mood and leave the palette closed unless you want custom colors.
posters.mood_active_hint: Atmosphere and lighting follow this mood; template colors stay unless you set a custom palette below.
posters.palette_pick_hint: Choose up to 6 colors — on generate they replace the template palette (mood only affects light and texture).
posters.sec_ref_hint: Preserves face or product. Paste with Ctrl+V on desktop.
posters.sec_food_ref_hint: Food only: photograph the plate (burger, snack, daily special, etc.) and upload here. The poster uses your dish as reference — do not use a person photo.
posters.food_upload_hint: JPG, PNG or WebP · plate, burger, dessert…
posters.upload_label: Attach artist, product, or event photo
posters.upload_hint: Preserves face / object · paste with Ctrl+V
posters.hint_flyer: Text shown on the poster. Empty fields keep the template original.
posters.hint_default: Extra prompt text (product, slogan, phrase). Empty = original template look.
posters.sec_layers_hint: Each box goes into the AI prompt — title, position, color, size, and style.
posters.sec_engine_hint: Quality and speed. All engines support reference photos.
posters.sec_format_hint: Poster ratio and how many versions to generate at once.
posters.sec_prompt_hint: Live preview of text that guides generation.
posters.premium_fallback: Premium engine does not support reference photos — using Pro engine.
posters.fill_cta: Fill in the fields and tap Generate.
posters.layer_empty: No extra layers. Click + to add text to the prompt.

settings.page_desc: Language, security, and studio defaults. Changes apply immediately.
settings.lang_hint: Applies across the dashboard and studio.
settings.pw_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.pw_google: You signed in with Google. Manage your password in your Google account.
settings.aspect_hint: Default aspect ratio when you open Generate.

common.upload_hint_drag: Drag, paste or camera · JPEG · PNG · WEBP

tools_pages.bg_mode_hint: Transparent, solid color, scene, or free text.
tools_pages.bg_pick_color: Pick a color — applied in preview and download.
tools_pages.bg_scene_ai: AI recreates the background while keeping the subject intact.
tools_pages.bg_preview_empty: Your cutout appears here after processing.
tools_pages.bg_result_png: PNG with transparency, ready to download.
tools_pages.bg_tune_hair_hint: Preserves fine strands — recommended for people.
tools_pages.bg_tune_shadow_hint: Adds a natural ground shadow for realism.
tools_pages.bg_prompt_ph: e.g. minimalist white studio background, soft light
tools_pages.upscale_desc_long: Upscale up to 4× while preserving fine detail. Ideal for soft photos, old prints, and print exports.
tools_pages.upscale_toggle_sharpen_hint: Boosts micro-contrast in textures, eyes, and edges.
tools_pages.upscale_toggle_denoise_hint: Smooths grain, JPEG artifacts, and noise in dark areas.
tools_pages.upscale_toggle_colors_hint: Keeps exact tones. Turn off to let AI reinterpret.
tools_pages.restore_toggle_faces_hint: Defines eyes, lips, brows, and natural skin texture.
tools_pages.restore_toggle_colors_hint: Revives faded tones. If B&W, adds realistic color.
tools_pages.restore_toggle_noise_hint: Removes scratches, dust, folds, and yellow stains.
tools_pages.restore_toggle_sharpen_hint: Enhances micro-detail in hair, fabric, and fine texture.
tools_pages.restore_prompt_ph: e.g. restore 1970 photo, improve child's face
tools_pages.restore_prompt_1: restore old 1970 photo, improve child's face
tools_pages.restore_desc_long: Repair faded, scratched, or low-quality prints while keeping a natural look. Reduces imperfections and improves faces, color, and clarity.
tools_pages.colorize_desc_long: Turn black-and-white photos into realistic, natural color images. Works with portraits, landscapes, and family photos.
tools_pages.colorize_toggle_skin_hint: Avoids orange, green, or plastic-looking skin.
tools_pages.colorize_toggle_details_hint: Enhances texture in hair, fabric, and eyes.
tools_pages.colorize_prompt_ph: e.g. colorize 1950 photo with natural realistic colors
tools_pages.colorize_prompt_1: colorize 1950 photo with natural realistic colors
tools_pages.colorize_prompt_4: 1970s beach with blue sky and golden sand
tools_pages.colorize_feel: Choose the final feel — clean digital or analog grain.

video.prompt_placeholder: A woman walks through tall grass, slow motion, golden hour…
video.res_original_hint: Default — same profile as your upload.
video.err_short: Describe the motion you want (at least 3 characters).
video.step_prompt: 1 · What do you want to see?
video.desc_body: Turn a phrase or a photo into a 4–8 second cinematic clip.
video.idea_1: A giant wave breaking in slow motion at sunset
video.idea_2: Drone flying over a misty morning forest
video.idea_3: Coffee cup with rising steam, macro focus
video.idea_4: Neon-lit street, rain reflections, cyberpunk vibe
video.grid_desc: Pick a category. Each tool opens in its own workspace with separate settings boxes.
video.cat_edit_short: Upload a short clip and describe what to change (outfit, background, lighting).
video.desc_text_mode: Write your prompt and generate a cinematic clip (4–8 s).
video.desc_image_mode: Upload an image and animate it into a cinematic clip (4–8 s).
video.mode_text_hint_desc: No image required. Describe the scene clearly for better motion.
video.need_image_mode: In Image → Video mode, upload an image first.
video.err_too_long: Source video is too long. Maximum allowed is {n} seconds.
video.quality_original_hint: Keeps source quality profile (best for consistency).
video.edit_eta_hint: Estimated processing time: {min}–{max} min (depends on source length and queue).
video.editor_admin_only: Video editor is in early access — admin only for now.
video.edit_desc: Upload a short clip (2–10 s) and describe the change. Face, body and motion stay locked — outfit, background, lighting, etc.
video.edit_video_hint: MP4 (H.264) or MOV · 2–10 s · up to 200 MB (large files upload to cloud automatically)
video.err_invalid_type: Unsupported video format. Use MP4 (H.264) or MOV.
video.err_use_video_zone: Use the video upload area for video files.
video.preview_hevc: HEVC codec is not supported for preview. Your video will still be processed.
video.preview_failed: Could not preview the video. Check the format or try again.
video.edit_prompt_placeholder: Change her jacket to a red leather biker jacket, keep everything else identical…
video.edit_ref_hint: Outfit, style or object to match
video.edit_blob_required: Large videos need cloud storage. Reload the page or use a clip under ~12 MB.
video.edit_s3_required: Large videos need S3 upload (AWS). Use a clip under ~12 MB or ask the admin to configure AWS_S3_BUCKET and CloudFront.
video.edit_wait_upload: Wait for the video upload to finish before generating.
video.edit_identity_note: We append identity-preservation instructions server-side. No NSFW filter on our side; the upstream model may still refuse some content.
video.edit_idea_1: Change the outfit to an elegant black evening dress
video.edit_idea_2: Replace the background with a snowy mountain landscape
video.edit_idea_3: Add warm golden-hour lighting, same person and pose
video.edit_large_hint: Clip over ~3 MB: uploads to cloud automatically before you tap Generate.
video.edit_cloud_required: Large videos need cloud storage. On Vercel add BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN or AWS S3 variables (see docs).
video.preview_codec_hint: Preview may not play in the browser (e.g. iPhone MOV/HEVC) — the file is still valid for generation. Prefer MP4 (H.264) if unsure.
video.upload_cloud_ready: Cloud upload complete — ready to generate

carousel.continuity_placeholder: e.g. anime cover style, neon city
carousel.mode_panoramic_hint: One wide image split into slides — ideal for seamless Instagram carousels.
carousel.mode_per_slide_hint: Each slide generated separately (more flexible, less guaranteed continuity).
carousel.load_example: Load example NEW · ERA OF · LUXO
carousel.title: Seamless Instagram carousel
carousel.desc_panoramic: One continuous panoramic image, then split into {n} vertical slides — character and background flow across cuts like Instagram.
carousel.desc_per_slide: Each slide generated separately ({per}/slide) — useful when you want different scenes per panel.
carousel.err_slide: Each slide needs a description (min. 3 characters).
carousel.err_brief: Describe the post context (min. 10 characters) so the AI follows the story.
carousel.gpt_fallback: GPT engine does not support reference photos — using Fast engine.
carousel.sec_ref_hint: Face, character, or main product — keeps identity across all slides.
carousel.upload_label: Attach the main face, character, or product
carousel.upload_hint: Paste with Ctrl+V · JPEG, PNG or WebP
carousel.brief_ph: e.g. Summer skincare launch, fresh tone, audience 25–35, CTA link in bio.
carousel.brief_hint: Product, campaign, tone, and audience — the AI uses this on every slide.
carousel.toggle_lighting_hint: Matching time of day and shadows.
carousel.toggle_smooth_hint: Links each slide to the next (per-slide mode).
carousel.panoramic_hint: Describe each panel as part of the same scene (left → center → right). Typography can span the cuts.
carousel.empty_panoramic: Panoramic mode: one continuous image split into vertical panels.
carousel.empty_per_slide: Set context, panels, and tap Render.
carousel.split_failed: Panoramic generated but failed to split into slides: {err} Open "View original panoramic" and crop manually, or try again.
carousel.example_loaded: Seamless example loaded — adjust text and render.
carousel.split_fail_msg: The panoramic was generated but automatic cropping failed. Use the image below or try again.
carousel.role_cover_hint: Hook — first image of the post

gallery.title: Your work.
gallery.confirm_delete: Delete this creation from the gallery?

landing.hero_eyebrow: For creators. For brands. For daily publishers.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Base rate 30 credits/€. Every account starts with {n} free credits. Larger packs include progressive bonuses — up to 42 cr/€ on Pro.

discover.home_strip_eyebrow: Made with Remake Pixel — real studio examples
discover.home_highlights_title: Everything you need to ship visuals faster.
discover.home_highlights_body: Generate, edit, animate, and design posters in one place — simple credits, no subscription.
discover.home_card_generate_desc: From a sentence to a publish-ready image in seconds.
discover.home_card_styles_desc: One photo, dozens of looks — cinema, anime, editorial, and more.
discover.home_card_video_desc: 6-second clips from text or a still frame.
discover.discover_intro_title: See how each session works, step by step.
discover.discover_intro_body: Scroll through real Remake Pixel flows — generate, edit, styles, video, posters, and tools. Each block shows what happens when you create.
discover.showcase_generate_title: From a sentence to a publish-ready image.
discover.showcase_generate_body: Describe what you imagine, pick an engine and style. Get cinematic, editorial, or hyper-real frames in seconds.
discover.showcase_edit_body: Upload any portrait and apply realism, editorial mood, light, skin, and detail — without losing your visual identity.
discover.showcase_styles_body: Curated visual packs across art, cinema, and editorial photography. Experiment fast, pick the best, publish.
discover.showcase_video_body: Create 6-second cinematic clips from text or an image. Built for Reels, teasers, and ads.
discover.showcase_posters_body: Dozens of templates for music, food, fitness, and flyers. Upload a photo, edit copy, ship a publish-ready visual.
discover.showcase_wizard_body: The wizard asks five questions and composes a strong prompt for you. Suggestions turn any theme into visual ideas.
discover.showcase_manga_body: Plan pages, characters, and scenes in a dedicated flow — from sketch to final panel with visual continuity.
discover.showcase_tools_title: Remove background, restore, upscale, and more.
discover.showcase_tools_body: Studio utilities to clean, enhance, and prep assets before you publish — same credit balance throughout.

translation.gen_prompt_placeholder: A girl reading in a sunlit attic, dust in the air, 35mm grain…
translation.gen_empty: Your first frame will appear here.
translation.gen_too_short: Tell me what to imagine — at least a few words.
translation.art_empty: Pick a style (tap a cover) or write 3+ words in the prompt.
translation.vid_prompt_placeholder: A woman walks through tall grass, slow motion, golden hour…

translation.ref_intro: For every friend who signs up with your code, you both get
translation.adm_db_missing: Admin needs MongoDB on Vercel. Without MONGO_URL there are no live users, purchases, or finance stats.
translation.adm_db_missing_hint: After saving env vars on Vercel, redeploy and reload this page.
translation.adm_stats_empty: No stats — check admin login and MONGO_URL on Vercel.
translation.adm_ip_hint: Green = 1 account per IP. Red = 2+ accounts on same IP.
translation.adm_fin_intro: How much you should have on Replicate to cover credits customers have not spent yet. Each purchase logs an estimated Replicate reserve.
translation.adm_fin_topup_hint: Based on credits in circulation × cost per credit. Update balance below to see shortfall.

translation.auth_email_offline_hint: Could not verify this email right now. You can still try to sign in.

translation.auth_forgot_generic_ok: If an account exists for this email, we sent reset instructions.
translation.auth_forgot_local_ok: Local recovery link created on this device.
translation.auth_forgot_local_hint: Offline mode: use this link on this device only.

translation.support_welcome_personal:
Hi{name}! I'm Sofia — I work with the Remake Pixel team and I'm here in the app to help you.

What would you like to do today: create something new, edit a photo, or understand credits?
translation.support_placeholder: Write as if you're texting a colleague…
translation.support_contact_hint: For billing or refunds, email suporte@remakepix.com — a human will follow up soon.

translation.tool_clothes_desc: Change anyone's outfit. Upload clothing or describe it in text.

translation.tool_wizard_desc: Not sure what to ask? Five questions and your prompt is ready.
translation.manga_desc: Characters, poses, scenes, and panels. GPT interprets each control before generation (Grok by default).
translation.manga_select_panel: Select a panel in the editor to configure.
translation.manga_no_characters: No characters yet — create the first one.
translation.manga_no_scenarios: No scenes yet — create the first one.
translation.manga_err_gpt_photo: GPT engine does not use photos — using Grok with reference.
translation.manga_err_prompt_short: Prompt too short — set character, pose, or balloon text.
translation.manga_err_no_url: Generation finished without URL — open Gallery.
translation.manga_status_fallback: Manga API unavailable — using artistic engine (Grok)…
translation.manga_no_image: No image — upload a PNG in the library.
translation.manga_select_panel_toast: Select a panel in the editor.
translation.manga_ref_sheet: Reference sheet: front, profile, back, expressions
translation.tool_result_empty: Your result appears here after you generate.
translation.studio_gen_hint_photo: Upload the required photo to continue
translation.studio_gen_hint_video: Upload your video and describe the edit to continue
translation.studio_gen_hint_prompt: Describe what you want (at least 3 characters)
translation.studio_gen_hint_fields: Fill in the required fields to continue
translation.studio_gen_hint_blocked: Add a photo or remove the style to generate from text only
translation.studio_gen_hint_brief: Complete the campaign brief and all slides to continue
translation.studio_gen_hint_garment: Add a garment photo or describe the outfit to continue
translation.studio_gen_hint_person: Upload the person photo to continue
translation.tool_prompt_ph: Describe what you want to create…
translation.tool_accept_formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP or HEIC up to 10 MB
translation.post_gpt_unavailable: GPT engine unavailable — OPENAI_API_KEY is missing on Vercel. Use Grok or Flux for now.
translation.upload_wait_generate: Wait until the upload finishes before tapping Generate.
translation.upload_heic_hint: Photo is still large — on Generate we will try cloud upload. On iPhone you can also use Settings → Camera → Most Compatible (JPEG).
translation.upload_compress_fail: Could not prepare this photo for upload. Try another image or export as JPEG (smaller) on your phone.
translation.drop_not_image: File is not a recognized image.
translation.pro_cat_realism_desc: Photographic looks — cinema, iPhone, studio, ultra-real
translation.pro_cat_mood_desc: Atmosphere and emotion — seductive, intense, romantic, playful
translation.pro_cat_enhance_desc: Surgical refinements — lighting, skin, eyes, clothing, color
translation.vid_err_short: Describe the motion you want (at least 3 characters).
translation.vid_step_prompt: 1 · What do you want to see?
translation.vid_desc_body: Turn a phrase or a photo into a 4–8 second cinematic clip.
translation.vid_idea_1: A giant wave breaking in slow motion at sunset
translation.vid_idea_2: Drone flying over a misty morning forest
translation.vid_idea_3: Coffee cup with rising steam, macro focus
translation.vid_idea_4: Neon-lit street, rain reflections, cyberpunk vibe
translation.vid_grid_desc: Pick a category. Each tool opens in its own workspace with separate settings boxes.
translation.vid_cat_edit_short: Upload a short clip and describe what to change (outfit, background, lighting).
translation.vid_desc_text_mode: Write your prompt and generate a cinematic clip (4–8 s).
translation.vid_desc_image_mode: Upload an image and animate it into a cinematic clip (4–8 s).
translation.vid_mode_text_hint_desc: No image required. Describe the scene clearly for better motion.
translation.vid_need_image_mode: In Image → Video mode, upload an image first.
translation.vid_err_too_long: Source video is too long. Maximum allowed is {n} seconds.
translation.vid_quality_original_hint: Keeps source quality profile (best for consistency).
translation.vid_edit_eta_hint: Estimated processing time: {min}–{max} min (depends on source length and queue).
translation.vid_editor_admin_only: Video editor is in early access — admin only for now.
translation.vid_edit_desc: Upload a short clip (2–10 s) and describe the change. Face, body and motion stay locked — outfit, background, lighting, etc.
translation.vid_edit_video_hint: MP4 (H.264) or MOV · 2–10 s · up to 200 MB (large files upload to cloud automatically)
translation.vid_err_too_large: Video too large ({size} MB — max {max} MB). Trim a short clip and try again.
translation.vid_err_invalid_type: Unsupported video format. Use MP4 (H.264) or MOV.
translation.vid_err_use_video_zone: Use the video upload area for video files.
translation.vid_preview_hevc: HEVC codec is not supported for preview. Your video will still be processed.
translation.vid_preview_failed: Could not preview the video. Check the format or try again.
translation.img_err_invalid_type: Unsupported image format. Use PNG, JPG, or WebP.
translation.img_err_read_failed: Could not read the photo. Try another image or take a new one with the camera.
translation.upload_invalid_type: Could not read the photo. Try another image.
translation.upload_preview_optional: You can still hit Generate — the photo is selected.
translation.vid_edit_prompt_placeholder: Change her jacket to a red leather biker jacket, keep everything else identical…
translation.vid_edit_ref_hint: Outfit, style or object to match
translation.vid_edit_blob_required: Large videos need cloud storage. Reload the page or use a clip under ~12 MB.
translation.vid_edit_s3_required: Large videos need S3 upload (AWS). Use a clip under ~12 MB or ask the admin to configure AWS_S3_BUCKET and CloudFront.
translation.vid_edit_wait_upload: Wait for the video upload to finish before generating.
translation.vid_edit_identity_note: We append identity-preservation instructions server-side. No NSFW filter on our side; the upstream model may still refuse some content.
translation.vid_edit_idea_1: Change the outfit to an elegant black evening dress
translation.vid_edit_idea_2: Replace the background with a snowy mountain landscape
translation.vid_edit_idea_3: Add warm golden-hour lighting, same person and pose
translation.prof_avatar_type: Choose an image (JPG, PNG or WebP).
translation.prof_account_hint: Technical info and preferences. ID is useful for support.
translation.inpaint_paint_first: Paint the area to change first.
translation.inpaint_prompt_label: What to put in the painted area
translation.upload_ready: Ready to generate — no extra save step
translation.art_subtitle: Pick an art style, combine lighting, lens and mood — generate from text or edit a photo.
translation.art_err_image_mode: Upload a photo in Image mode.
translation.art_refine_unavailable: Refine unavailable — using your original prompt.
translation.wiz_modal_apply_hint: Edit if you like, then apply to the prompt field — your selected style and effects stay in place.
translation.gal_confirm_delete: Delete this creation from the gallery?
translation.art_prompt_ph_image: What you want to change in the photo...
translation.art_result_empty: The result appears here after generating
translation.art_hero_subtitle: Create cinematic, anime, realistic or conceptual images with professional control.
translation.art_result_empty_hint: Choose a style, tune effects and hit generate.
translation.art_quick_1: Cinematic portrait, soft rim light, shallow depth of field
translation.art_quick_2: Anime character, vibrant colors, clean line art, studio background
translation.art_quick_3: Epic fantasy landscape, golden hour, volumetric fog
translation.art_quick_4: Editorial fashion photo, dramatic shadows, glossy skin
translation.art_quick_5: Cyberpunk city street, neon rain, moody atmosphere
translation.art_quick_6: Watercolor illustration, dreamy pastel palette, paper texture
translation.art_module_style_hint: 110+ styles · identity lock on every photo edit (May 2026)
translation.art_module_prompt_hint: Describe your vision or edit a photo
translation.art_lab_image_hint: AI Lab requires Image mode with a photo.
translation.art_lab_need_photo: Upload a photo for AI Lab styles.
translation.art_photo_engine_note: Premium photoreal · identity locked · professional previews
translation.art_photo_desc: Upload your photo and pick a photographic look — face, age and body stay unchanged.
translation.art_photo_identity_badge: Identity lock · face · age · body · pose
translation.art_photo_image_hint: Photography styles require Image mode with your photo.
translation.art_photo_need_photo: Upload a photo for photoreal styles.
translation.art_refine_unchanged: Prompt unchanged — try adding more detail.
translation.art_flow_step_generate_hint: Describe your idea or upload a photo to edit
translation.art_flow_step_style_hint: Pick a look from the gallery to steer the result
translation.art_flow_step_effects_hint: Lighting, lens and mood — extra control only if you need it
translation.art_pick_style_hint: Write your prompt first, then pick a style in step 2 if you want.
translation.upload_preview_unavailable: Preview unavailable in this browser; the photo will still be used when generating.
translation.upload_err_offline: No network connection. Check Wi‑Fi or mobile data and try again.
translation.upload_err_send_online: Could not send the file to the server. Reload the page (Ctrl+F5) and try again.
translation.upload_err_server_timeout: Upload took too long. Use a smaller file or try later.
translation.upload_err_preview: Could not show a preview in this browser. You can still generate with this file.
translation.upload_err_payload_video: File too large for a single request. Wait for cloud upload or use a shorter clip.
translation.upload_err_file_large: File too large. Try a smaller one.
translation.upload_err_cloud: Cloud upload failed. Try again or use a smaller file.
translation.upload_err_server: Server error. Try again in a minute.
translation.upload_err_maintenance: Server temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
translation.prof_page_desc: Manage how you appear on Remake Pixel, credit balance and account data in one place.
translation.prof_unlimited_hint: Account with unlimited credits for eligible operations.
translation.prof_email_confirmed: Email marked as confirmed on this device.
translation.wiz_desc: Not sure how to describe your idea? In 5 steps I'll guide you to a pro prompt ready to generate.
translation.wiz_q4_ph: e.g. "Woman in her 30s with short hair on a Lisbon rooftop at sunset, warm golden light"
translation.wiz_q5_ph: Type "no" to skip, or describe who/what is the reference
translation.wiz_q5_hint: e.g. "Ana's face from iPhone photos", "an Eames chair", or leave blank.
translation.post_editor_error_desc: Something went wrong loading the editor. Go back and try again, or refresh the page.
translation.vid_edit_large_hint: Clip over ~3 MB: uploads to cloud automatically before you tap Generate.
translation.vid_edit_cloud_required: Large videos need cloud storage. On Vercel add BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN or AWS S3 variables (see docs).
translation.vid_preview_codec_hint: Preview may not play in the browser (e.g. iPhone MOV/HEVC) — the file is still valid for generation. Prefer MP4 (H.264) if unsure.
translation.vid_upload_cloud_ready: Cloud upload complete — ready to generate
translation.common_upload_hint_drag: Drag, paste or camera · JPEG · PNG · WEBP
translation.bg_mode_hint: Transparent, solid color, scene, or free text.
translation.bg_pick_color: Pick a color — applied in preview and download.
translation.bg_scene_ai: AI recreates the background while keeping the subject intact.
translation.bg_preview_empty: Your cutout appears here after processing.
translation.bg_result_png: PNG with transparency, ready to download.
translation.bg_tune_hair_hint: Preserves fine strands — recommended for people.
translation.bg_tune_shadow_hint: Adds a natural ground shadow for realism.
translation.bg_prompt_ph: e.g. minimalist white studio background, soft light
translation.upscale_desc_long: Upscale up to 4× while preserving fine detail. Ideal for soft photos, old prints, and print exports.
translation.upscale_toggle_sharpen_hint: Boosts micro-contrast in textures, eyes, and edges.
translation.upscale_toggle_denoise_hint: Smooths grain, JPEG artifacts, and noise in dark areas.
translation.upscale_toggle_colors_hint: Keeps exact tones. Turn off to let AI reinterpret.
translation.restore_toggle_faces_hint: Defines eyes, lips, brows, and natural skin texture.
translation.restore_toggle_colors_hint: Revives faded tones. If B&W, adds realistic color.
translation.restore_toggle_noise_hint: Removes scratches, dust, folds, and yellow stains.
translation.restore_toggle_sharpen_hint: Enhances micro-detail in hair, fabric, and fine texture.
translation.restore_prompt_ph: e.g. restore 1970 photo, improve child's face
translation.restore_prompt_1: restore old 1970 photo, improve child's face
translation.restore_desc_long: Repair faded, scratched, or low-quality prints while keeping a natural look. Reduces imperfections and improves faces, color, and clarity.
translation.colorize_desc_long: Turn black-and-white photos into realistic, natural color images. Works with portraits, landscapes, and family photos.
translation.colorize_toggle_skin_hint: Avoids orange, green, or plastic-looking skin.
translation.colorize_toggle_details_hint: Enhances texture in hair, fabric, and eyes.
translation.colorize_prompt_ph: e.g. colorize 1950 photo with natural realistic colors
translation.colorize_prompt_1: colorize 1950 photo with natural realistic colors
translation.colorize_prompt_4: 1970s beach with blue sky and golden sand
translation.colorize_feel: Choose the final feel — clean digital or analog grain.
translation.clothes_garment_helper: Photo of the garment to wear
translation.clothes_change_color_hint: Keeps outfit, changes only color or pattern
translation.clothes_prompt_ph: e.g. "elegant red silk dress with thin straps, evening event style"
translation.clothes_err_person: Upload a photo of the person.
translation.clothes_err_garment: Upload a garment photo OR describe the new outfit in text.
translation.clothes_mode_fashion_desc: GPT engine · keeps the same face, body and pose from your photo; applies the garment reference with premium editorial lighting/background. Upload person + garment photos.
translation.clothes_fashion_garment_helper: Clear photo of the garment or outfit
translation.clothes_err_fashion_both: Fashion mode: upload both person and garment photos.
translation.clothes_desc: Swap anyone's outfit. Upload a person photo and garment reference or describe the look in text.
translation.sug_desc: Generate free ideas and prompts before spending credits. Pick a theme, use presets, or let the system mix styles like a randomizer.
translation.sug_modal_desc: Free ideas — pick one and apply without leaving the studio.
translation.ref_title: Share the Studio and earn credits.
translation.ref_intro_suffix: free credits. No limit, no fine print. The more you share, the more generations you unlock.
translation.ref_step1_desc: Send the link to friends or copy your personal code.
translation.ref_step2_desc: Each new registration with your code counts.
translation.ref_step3_desc: You get +{n} and your friend does too. No limits.
translation.ref_share_msg: Create cinematic AI images on Remake Pixel. Use my code {code} and we both get bonus credits: {link}
translation.bill_subtitle: Buy credits once and use them whenever you want — no subscription required, no expiry dates.
translation.car_mode_panoramic_hint: One wide image split into slides — ideal for seamless Instagram carousels.
translation.car_mode_per_slide_hint: Each slide generated separately (more flexible, less guaranteed continuity).
translation.car_load_example: Load example NEW · ERA OF · LUXO
translation.car_desc_panoramic: One continuous panoramic image, then split into {n} vertical slides — character and background flow across cuts like Instagram.
translation.car_desc_per_slide: Each slide generated separately ({per}/slide) — useful when you want different scenes per panel.
translation.car_err_slide: Each slide needs a description (min. 3 characters).
translation.car_err_brief: Describe the post context (min. 10 characters) so the AI follows the story.
translation.car_gpt_fallback: GPT engine does not support reference photos — using Fast engine.
translation.post_grid_desc: {n} real templates from the original bot — music, food, fitness, motivational and flyers. Apply your photo and generate in high resolution with the engine you choose.
translation.post_variant_picker_desc: Pick a layout variation — same fields and identity, different pose, colors, and typography. Then edit and generate.
translation.post_flyers_pick_hint: Flyers: click a template to choose 1 of 5 layout styles (pose, colors, typography), then edit and generate.
translation.post_premium_pick_hint: Pick a category template — opens the style grid (Executive Vision, Night Vibes, etc.). Then edit copy, photo and logo before generating.
translation.post_sec_logo_hint: Small corner logo — transparent PNG works best.
translation.post_sec_fashion_person_hint: Required — locks face, body and skin tone across every panel.
translation.post_fashion_person_upload_hint: Full or half body · sharp face
translation.post_sec_fashion_garment_hint: Second photo of the outfit — copies fabric, cut and colors onto the same person.
translation.post_fashion_photo_required: Upload a person photo before generating.
translation.post_sec_output_lang_hint: Language for all text on the poster.
translation.post_fill_hint: Fill in the fields and tap Generate.
translation.post_template_ready: Ready-to-use template — attach a reference photo (optional), pick the AI model, set mood and palette. The prompt is tuned for the best result.
translation.post_visual_hint: By default the poster keeps the template colors and mood. Use “Template default” for mood and leave the palette closed unless you want custom colors.
translation.post_mood_active_hint: Atmosphere and lighting follow this mood; template colors stay unless you set a custom palette below.
translation.post_palette_pick_hint: Choose up to 6 colors — on generate they replace the template palette (mood only affects light and texture).
translation.pro_extra_ph: e.g. softer skin, brighter eyes, grey studio background…
translation.pro_upload_hint: JPEG · PNG · WEBP · paste with Ctrl+V
translation.post_sec_ref_hint: Preserves face or product. Paste with Ctrl+V on desktop.
translation.post_sec_food_ref_hint: Food only: photograph the plate (burger, snack, daily special, etc.) and upload here. The poster uses your dish as reference — do not use a person photo.
translation.post_food_upload_hint: JPG, PNG or WebP · plate, burger, dessert…
translation.post_upload_label: Attach artist, product, or event photo
translation.post_upload_hint: Preserves face / object · paste with Ctrl+V
translation.post_hint_flyer: Text shown on the poster. Empty fields keep the template original.
translation.post_hint_default: Extra prompt text (product, slogan, phrase). Empty = original template look.
translation.post_sec_layers_hint: Each box goes into the AI prompt — title, position, color, size, and style.
translation.post_sec_engine_hint: Quality and speed. All engines support reference photos.
translation.post_sec_format_hint: Poster ratio and how many versions to generate at once.
translation.post_sec_prompt_hint: Live preview of text that guides generation.
translation.post_premium_fallback: Premium engine does not support reference photos — using Pro engine.
translation.post_fill_cta: Fill in the fields and tap Generate.
translation.post_layer_empty: No extra layers. Click + to add text to the prompt.
translation.bill_terms_1: When you buy a package, you accept that credits are digital and not refundable in cash after payment is confirmed, except where the law requires otherwise.
translation.bill_terms_2: Each generation debits the cost shown in the tool. If the result is delivered successfully, that spend is final.
translation.bill_terms_3: If a generation fails (server error, timeout, empty output, or content blocked by the model), credits for that attempt are refunded automatically.
translation.bill_terms_4: Requests with adult or explicit content may be refused by models (e.g. Grok); credits are refunded automatically — rephrase the prompt neutrally.
translation.bill_terms_confirm: By clicking Buy, you confirm these terms.
translation.bill_custom_subtitle: Pick how many credits you need — base rate {rate} credits per €1 (no volume bonus).
translation.bill_pkg_starter_blurb: Limited-time offer for new creators: more credits to start without worry.
translation.bill_pkg_creator_b4: No feature lock — pay per use
translation.bill_pkg_studio_blurb: Highest credit volume for heavy production workflows.
translation.bill_pkg_studio_b4: No feature lock — pay per use
translation.bill_pkg_pro_blurb: Best rate for agencies and power users — 40% bonus on base credits.
translation.bill_faq1_a: Each tool shows the cost before you generate. Text-to-image starts at 9 credits; HD, prompt enhance, and premium effects add surcharges. Video and Pro tools cost more to reflect API usage.
translation.bill_faq2_a: No. Purchased credits stay in your account until you use them.
translation.bill_faq3_a: Paid credit packages are not refundable in cash after purchase (except where the law requires). Credits spent on a successful generation are not returned. If a generation fails due to a technical error, timeout, or model block, credits for that attempt are refunded automatically.
translation.bill_faq4_q: Which payment methods do you accept?
translation.bill_faq4_a: Secure payments via Stripe: credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
translation.bill_faq5_a: No. Features are credit-based. The more advanced options you enable (quality, prompt enhance, video edits), the more credits are charged.
translation.car_sec_ref_hint: Face, character, or main product — keeps identity across all slides.
translation.car_upload_label: Attach the main face, character, or product
translation.car_upload_hint: Paste with Ctrl+V · JPEG, PNG or WebP
translation.car_brief_ph: e.g. Summer skincare launch, fresh tone, audience 25–35, CTA link in bio.
translation.car_brief_hint: Product, campaign, tone, and audience — the AI uses this on every slide.
translation.car_toggle_lighting_hint: Matching time of day and shadows.
translation.car_toggle_smooth_hint: Links each slide to the next (per-slide mode).
translation.car_panoramic_hint: Describe each panel as part of the same scene (left → center → right). Typography can span the cuts.
translation.car_empty_panoramic: Panoramic mode: one continuous image split into vertical panels.
translation.car_empty_per_slide: Set context, panels, and tap Render.
translation.car_split_failed: Panoramic generated but failed to split into slides: {err} Open "View original panoramic" and crop manually, or try again.
translation.car_example_loaded: Seamless example loaded — adjust text and render.
translation.car_split_fail_msg: The panoramic was generated but automatic cropping failed. Use the image below or try again.
translation.car_role_cover_hint: Hook — first image of the post
translation.consent_body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember preferences. By continuing, you accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
translation.legal_terms_1: Remake Pixel is an AI image and video studio. You must be 18+ (or the legal age in your country) to use paid features.
translation.legal_terms_2: Credits are digital. Paid packages are generally non-refundable in cash after purchase, except where the law requires otherwise.
translation.legal_terms_3: Each generation debits the cost shown in the tool. Successful deliveries are final. Failed generations (server error, timeout, empty output, model block) are refunded automatically.
translation.legal_terms_4: You are responsible for prompts and uploads. Do not use the service for illegal content or to violate third-party rights.
translation.legal_privacy_1: We process account data (email, name), usage (generations, credits), and files you upload to run AI models and store results.
translation.legal_privacy_2: We use processors (hosting, AI APIs, payments). We do not sell your personal data.
translation.legal_privacy_3: You may request access or deletion of your account by emailing suporte@remakepix.com.
translation.legal_cookies_1: Essential: session token (rp_token), settings (rp_settings), language, legal consent, and pending generation state.
translation.legal_cookies_2: We do not use third-party advertising cookies on the studio.
translation.wa_settings_desc: When a generation finishes, you can open WhatsApp with a ready-made message. True push notifications to your number require WhatsApp Business API (Meta) — we are preparing that integration.
translation.wa_enable: Suggest WhatsApp when a generation completes
translation.wa_invalid_phone: Enter a valid number with country code (digits only).
translation.hero_subtitle: Photos, posters, carousels and short videos — generated in seconds, ready to publish.
translation.prof_data_subtitle: Technical info and preferences. The ID is useful for support.
translation.prof_recovery_text: Password and generation preferences are in
